html:
Exclusive to:

GenericBurnt


The Royal Tapestry is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is obtained by upgrading a DIY Royalty Kit with 20 Kelp Fronds, 10 Pig Skins and 15 Beefalo Wools.

A normal Merm passing close to the Royal Tapestry will sit on it. The player has to feed the Merm with a total of 50 to obtain a King of the Merms.

DIY Royalty Kit

GenericBurnt

The DIY Royalty Kit is a Structure exclusive to Wurt in Don't Starve Together. It requires 5 Boards and 5 Ropes to craft. It can be placed on Marsh Turf. The structure can be upgraded to a Royal Tapestry.

Trivia

  • Wendy's quote for a completed unoccupied tapestry is a reference to the Aesop Fable "The Frogs Who Desired A King".
  • Characters have quotes for a Merm sitting on the Royal Tapestry:

Gallery

  • A Merm's sitting on a Royal Tapestry.
  • Burnt DIY Royalty Kit.
  • Burnt Royal Tapestry.

Exclusive to:
Royal Tapestry
Object Info
Can be Burned
Structure Info
×20 ×10 ×15 ( only)
Source
Can be Hammered
Spawns
Miscellaneous
"mermthrone"
GenericBurnt
“Looks fit for a swamp king!”
–Wilson
“I shouldn't burn it... but I want to...”
–Willow
“Big sitting mat looks very inviting.”
–Wolfgang
“"The Frogs Who Desired a King"...”
–Wendy
“THIS IS WHERE THEY DEPOSIT THEIR ROYALTY”
–WX-78
“The "if it fits, it sits" method of choosing a monarch. I'm familiar.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm from a Commonwealth, myself.”
–Woodie
“Not especially impressive for a "throne".”
–Maxwell
“Have yöu chösen a chieftain?”
–Wigfrid
“Hey, can we be the king? We can take turns!”
–Webber
“Très royal!”
–Warly
“Place for big Glub Glub”
–Wormwood
“Not bad handiwork.”
–Winona
“A mat made for a monarch.”
–Wortox
“Good seat for Merm King!”
–Wurt
“Wow, there's a whole bog monster civilization!”
–Walter
“It's... not exactly the nicest rug I've ever seen.”
–Wanda
“There was something fishy about that throne anyway.”
–Wilson
“Did I do that? It's hard to keep track.”
–Willow
“Is burnt up.”
–Wolfgang
“Their kingdom vanishes as swiftly as it appeared.”
–Wendy
“HA HA. HILARIOUS”
–WX-78
“Oh my... I suppose they'll have to start all over.”
–Wickerbottom
“Sorry aboot your throne, there.”
–Woodie
“Someone finally took care of that hideous throw rug.”
–Maxwell
“The thröne hath been set ablaze!”
–Wigfrid
“Yikes! What happened?”
–Webber
“The throne has been charbroiled!”
–Warly
“Oh. Gone”
–Wormwood
“Yeesh, what a mess.”
–Winona
“A little rain could have saved their reign.”
–Wortox
“WHO DO THIS?!”
–Wurt
“I'm so sorry about that!”
–Walter
“It looks like the monarchy came to an abrupt end.”
–Wanda
The Royal Tapestry is a Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is obtained by upgrading a DIY Royalty Kit with 20 Kelp Fronds, 10 Pig Skins and 15 Beefalo Wools.
A normal Merm passing close to the Royal Tapestry will sit on it. The player has to feed the Merm with a total of 50 to obtain a King of the Merms.
DIY Royalty Kit[edit | edit source]
DIY Royalty Kit
"Usher in a new Merm Monarchy."
Crafting
×5 ×5 ( only)
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"mermthrone_construction"
GenericBurnt
“Just what is she planning?”
–Wilson
“What's all this stuff for?”
–Willow
“Tiny fish girl seems very busy.”
–Wolfgang
“I don't know why you bother.”
–Wendy
“THE GREEN ONE IS DOING SOMETHING USELESS”
–WX-78
“Careful not to get a splinter, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“You look like you've got this under control.”
–Woodie
“What is that little creature up to?”
–Maxwell
“The little beast töils away.”
–Wigfrid
“Can we help?”
–Webber
“You have all the ingredients you need?”
–Warly
“Making something”
–Wormwood
“Whatcha makin' there, kid?”
–Winona
“My my, what mischief are you making?”
–Wortox
“There lots of Kings in fairy stories... look easy to make!”
–Wurt
“It looks like they're building something, but what?”
–Walter
“This might take a while to piece together...”
–Wanda
“I suppose we'll never know what it was for now.”
–Wilson
“Hahaha-! Uh, I mean, oh no...”
–Willow
“All gone in puff of smoke.”
–Wolfgang
“All that work, for nothing.”
–Wendy
“THIS WAS A WASTE OF TIME”
–WX-78
“Oh, oh dear...”
–Wickerbottom
“It's all gone up in flames, eh?”
–Woodie
“Such a waste of time and energy.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis a sad day för the fish beasts.”
–Wigfrid
“It's burnt up!”
–Webber
“It's been burnt to a crisp!”
–Warly
“All gone”
–Wormwood
“Guess it's back to the drawing board.”
–Winona
“Looks like someone played a little prank!”
–Wortox
“NOOOOOO!!”
–Wurt
“Darnit! Now I'll never know what it was!”
–Walter
“What a horrible waste of time and energy!”
–Wanda
The DIY Royalty Kit is a Structure exclusive to Wurt in Don't Starve Together. It requires 5 Boards and 5 Ropes to craft. It can be placed on Marsh Turf. The structure can be upgraded to a Royal Tapestry.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Wendy's quote for a completed unoccupied tapestry is a reference to the Aesop Fable "The Frogs Who Desired A King".
Characters have quotes for a Merm sitting on the Royal Tapestry:
“They operate on a first-come, first-sovereigned basis.”
–Wilson
“What makes that guy so special?”
–Willow
“Looks too scrawny to be king!”
–Wolfgang
“Are you ready to shoulder the burdens of leadership?”
–Wendy
“SUBJECT DOES NOT POSSESS REQUIRED GIRTH TO BE KING”
–WX-78
“The heir, apparently.”
–Wickerbottom
“This guy's really the best you got, eh?”
–Woodie
“Kings are easily made around here.”
–Maxwell
“Thöu art certain he is fit tö be leader?”
–Wigfrid
“Wow, becoming a king looks easy!”
–Webber
“Hm... he doesn't seem so different from the others.”
–Warly
“Special Glub Glub?”
–Wormwood
“Looks like someone got a promotion!”
–Winona
“Hyuyuyu, a prince! Charming!”
–Wortox
“Need to fatten up if you gonna be proper King!”
–Wurt
“I wonder how they pick their king?”
–Walter
“What a delightfully odd way to choose a king!”
–Wanda

A Merm's sitting on a Royal Tapestry.
Burnt DIY Royalty Kit.
Burnt Royal Tapestry.

The '''Royal Tapestry''' is a [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is obtained by upgrading a DIY Royalty Kit with 20 [[Kelp Fronds]], 10 [[Pig Skin]]s and 15 [[Beefalo Wool]]s.

A normal [[Merm]] passing close to the Royal Tapestry will sit on it. The player has to feed the [[Merm]] with a total of 50 {{hunger}} to obtain a [[King of the Merms]].

The '''DIY Royalty Kit''' is a [[Structure]] exclusive to [[Wurt]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It requires 5 [[Boards]] and 5 [[Rope]]s to craft. It can be placed on [[Marsh Turf]]. The structure can be upgraded to a Royal Tapestry.

{{Clear}}
